message:
Fix adaptive radix tree node split to clone value before move

When splitting an existing leaf node during insertion at a shared
prefix, the old value was moved into the new ArtNode::Leaf without
cloning, causing a use-after-move when the value was also needed
for the replacement node. Added .clone() on old_val to ensure the
value is properly duplicated before being consumed by the Box::new
constructor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
